document.name: paperclip-read-compact
document.description: Same Paperclip read chain as paperclip-read-snapshot, then a set_state step that projects jq-derived summaries and clears the bulky raw tool payload so completed final_state and MCP payloads stay small (token-efficiency demo). Each jq assignment sees the full pre-step state; merge reducers apply after.

report.jq: { raw_chars: ((.text // "") | tostring | length), preview: ((.text // "") | tostring | .[0:120]), parsed_issue_ids: (try (((.text // "") | fromjson) as $d | (if ($d | type) == "array" then $d elif ($d.items | type) == "array" then $d.items elif ($d.issues | type) == "array" then $d.issues elif ($d.results | type) == "array" then $d.results elif ($d.data | type) == "array" then $d.data elif ($d.data.items | type) == "array" then $d.data.items elif ($d.data.issues | type) == "array" then $d.data.issues else [] end) | map(.id // .issueId // .issue_id // .uuid // empty) | map(select(. != null and . != ""))) catch []) }
